name: @chbrain/khai-engine-forgiveness
description: khai engine content, the forgiveness domain: the harmed party's unilateral release of a grievance, distinct from the bilateral rebuilding of the relationship
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Forgiveness as process: how a persona releases or keeps a grievance they are owed -- decisional, emotional, withheld, or turned on the self -- a unilateral move that does not wait on the offender and does not rebuild the relationship.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_forgiveness.md) declares forgiveness as a unilateral release: the persona who is owed a debt for a wrong decides to stop collecting it, lowering avoidance and revenge without waiting on the offender's apology or deserving.
card.issue: Four readings a persona may run: decisional (the conduct changes before the feeling), emotional (resentment is replaced by empathy), withheld (the debt is kept, by justice or by self-protection), and self (the persona is both offender and creditor). Each gives up -- or keeps -- a different debt.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the reading it is running toward the wrong it carries.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real forgiveness reading. Whether the release is true to the persona and the wrong is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Then give the persona its reading under Projection, against a wrong it actually holds. Read it in how the persona meets the one who wronged them -- collecting, or setting it down -- never as a label, and never as reconciliation, which is repair's.
